raw_effect: Immobilization: Change in the failure to respond or lack of movement after mechanical stimulation.
normalised_effect_lower: immobilization change in the failure to respond or lack of movement after mechanical stimulation

raw_effect: Population Growth: Rate of growth. Equivalent to intrinsic rate of increase and maximum possible rate of growth for species. Calculated by relating biomass or abundance to time. Life table data and germination rates are included.
normalised_effect_lower: population growth rate of growth equivalent to intrinsic rate of increase and maximum possible rate of growth for species calculated by relating biomass or abundance to time life table data and germination rates are included

raw_effect: Reproduction: Change in male and/or female reproductive ability, fertilization and fertilization rate. Includes vegetative reproductive processes.
normalised_effect_lower: reproduction change in male and or female reproductive ability fertilization and fertilization rate includes vegetative reproductive processes

raw_effect: Development: Change in ability to grow to a more mature life stage and in time between separate life stages, molting, ability to germinate and cell cleavage.
normalised_effect_lower: development change in ability to grow to a more mature life stage and in time between separate life stages molting ability to germinate and cell cleavage

raw_effect: Photosynthesis: Change in plant productivity indicated by change in 14C or CO2 uptake or oxygen production.
normalised_effect_lower: photosynthesis change in plant productivity indicated by change in 14c or co2 uptake or oxygen production

raw_effect: Biomass: Productivity measurement equivalent to yield and standing crop. Total mass or weight of a living organism per area or volume measure either directly through dry weight or indirectly.
normalised_effect_lower: biomass productivity measurement equivalent to yield and standing crop total mass or weight of a living organism per area or volume measure either directly through dry weight or indirectly

raw_effect: Population Size Reduction: Quantifiable reduction in the population size. This effect appears in the database, but new records are coded to represent clearly defined effects under the major effect group POPCOM.
normalised_effect_lower: population size reduction quantifiable reduction in the population size this effect appears in the database but new records are coded to represent clearly defined effects under the major effect group popcom

raw_effect: Chlorophyll: Measurable change in chlorophyll content including chlorophyll a content, chlorosis.
normalised_effect_lower: chlorophyll measurable change in chlorophyll content including chlorophyll a content chlorosis

raw_effect: Abundance: Number of individuals of a taxon per unit area equivalent to density. Comparison to controls; not related to time.
normalised_effect_lower: abundance number of individuals of a taxon per unit area equivalent to density comparison to controls not related to time

raw_effect: Shell Deposition: Change in the ability to grow a shell.
normalised_effect_lower: shell deposition change in the ability to grow a shell

raw_effect: Teratogenesis: Quantifiable occurrence of abnormal offspring.
normalised_effect_lower: teratogenesis quantifiable occurrence of abnormal offspring

raw_effect: Filtration Rate: Change in rate of filtration.
normalised_effect_lower: filtration rate change in rate of filtration

raw_effect: Hatchability: Change in percent hatch, time to hatch or number of eggs hatched.
normalised_effect_lower: hatchability change in percent hatch time to hatch or number of eggs hatched

raw_effect: Emergence: Change in the emergence from larval stage into the adult stage.
normalised_effect_lower: emergence change in the emergence from larval stage into the adult stage

raw_effect: Population: Change in number of species groups. This effect code appears in the database, but new records are coded to represent clearly defined effects under the major effect group POPCOM (Populuation/Community).
normalised_effect_lower: population change in number of species groups this effect code appears in the database but new records are coded to represent clearly defined effects under the major effect group popcom populuation community

normalised_effect_lower: mortality reproduction rate appearance of first offspring

raw_effect: reproduction rate, parental mortality, appearance of first offspring
normalised_effect_lower: reproduction rate parental mortality appearance of first offspring

raw_effect: Higher condition factor (weight divided by length) in fish at the 100 and 200 æg/L level
normalised_effect_lower: higher condition factor weight divided by length in fish at the 100 and 200 g l level

raw_effect: Nitrogen Fixation: Change in ability of aquatic plants to fix nitrogen.
normalised_effect_lower: nitrogen fixation change in ability of aquatic plants to fix nitrogen

raw_effect: Regeneration: Change in ability to regenerate a body part, byssus production.
normalised_effect_lower: regeneration change in ability to regenerate a body part byssus production

raw_effect: cell growth based on fluorimetric values
normalised_effect_lower: cell growth based on fluorimetric values

raw_effect: growth (based on weight at the end of the test)
normalised_effect_lower: growth based on weight at the end of the test
growth rate or yield not specified

raw_effect: survival, final gravid females, number of produced young, total births, number of young per female, and births per female
normalised_effect_lower: survival final gravid females number of produced young total births number of young per female and births per female

raw_effect: survival, spawning activity and egg hatchability
normalised_effect_lower: survival spawning activity and egg hatchability

normalised_effect_lower: total progeny number of broods mean brood size
